ItacAcademyItem.Name: Lettere Armi e Musica (Accademia di)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Complete list of members was published by Angelo Solerti, in Atti della deputazione ferrarese di storia patria, vol. 4, 2 (Ferrara, 1892).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
